hypothesis: Augmenting the ∆-learning XGBoost model with metal-center localized electronic descriptors extracted from spin-polarized GFN1-xTB calculations (e.g., atomic magnetic moments and d‑orbital frontier-orbital contributions) will reduce the mean absolute error of predicted HSE06 band gaps for MOFs containing Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, and Ni by at least 30% compared to the current ∆-learning model trained without these descriptors.
